name: SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. Units
summary: SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. Units consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The unit trades under the ticker SMAPU until the components separate.
